posts.hook: You don't need a $200K CMO. You need a fractional one.
posts.body: A fractional CMO gives you senior marketing strategy without the full-time cost. Perfect for growing businesses that need direction, not just execution. Slide 1: What is a fractional CMO? Slide 2: What they do vs. what they don't do. Slide 3: When you actually need one. Slide 4: How to find a good one.
posts.cta: Link in bio — book a free call

posts.hook: Signs you need a fractional CMO (not a full-time hire):
posts.body: 1/ You have a marketing team but no strategy. 2/ You're spending on ads with no clear funnel. 3/ You're about to raise a round and need positioning. 4/ You can't afford $180K+ but need senior-level thinking. A fractional CMO costs a fraction of that. That's the point.
posts.cta: What questions do you have about fractional CMOs?

posts.hook: Your competitors are running marketing on autopilot. Are you?
posts.body: AI automation can handle lead follow-up, email sequences, social scheduling, and reporting — without adding headcount. We help agencies and growing businesses set this up end to end. Here's what that looks like in practice.
posts.cta: DM us 'AI' to see our automation package

posts.hook: 5 marketing tasks you should stop doing manually in 2026:
posts.body: 1/ Lead follow-up emails — automate based on behavior. 2/ Monthly performance reports — pull from CRM automatically. 3/ Social post scheduling — batch + queue. 4/ Inbound message replies — auto-response + routing. 5/ Re-engagement campaigns — trigger-based, not calendar-based. All of this runs without a bigger team.
posts.cta: Which one is your biggest time sink?
